001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel;
005import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
007import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository.EggGroupRepository;
008import jakarta.inject.Inject;
009import java.util.List;
010import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
011
012@HiltViewModel
013public class EggGroupViewModel extends ViewModel {
014
015  private final EggGroupRepository eggGroupRepository;
016
017  @Inject
018  EggGroupViewModel(EggGroupRepository eggGroupRepository) {
019    this.eggGroupRepository = eggGroupRepository;
020  }
021
022  public LiveData<List<EggGroup>> getByBatch(long batchId) {
023    return eggGroupRepository.getByBatch(batchId);
024  }
025
026  public LiveData<EggGroup> get(long id) {
027    return eggGroupRepository.get(id);
028  }
029
030  public CompletableFuture<Long> save(EggGroup eggGroup) {
031    return eggGroupRepository.save(eggGroup);
032  }
033}
